question: Q-t1-seeds-reach-woven-entrances
conjecture: On the woven C3 graph, frozen top-3 cosine seeds reach at least one admissible chain entrance for >=1 development query on BOTH datasets, and the unmodified typed kernel reaches a legal depth-two target for >=1 query on BOTH datasets (published frozen baseline: 0/200 on each).

already_public_before_registration.note: H3-C0 gate waterfall published: legal claim-continuous second hop = 0/200 (both datasets) on frozen graph; certificate top-3 seeds reached 3 C1-style chain entrances on 2Wiki with 0 predicate matches. B1 published C3 T0 chain counts (MuSiQue 6 / 2Wiki 25) and full chain ledgers; entrance sets are derivable from the published B1 receipts, but no seed-reachability or kernel run on the woven graph has been computed or inspected before this registration.

kill_conditions: t1_min = 0 -> woven chains are unreachable from frozen seeds; B1 unlock is judged idle spin for the deterministic lane.

novel (kernel legal depth-2) min = 0 while t1_min > 0 -> entrances reachable but predicate/role gates kill continuation; the bottleneck moves to T2 and must be re-diagnosed before any further weave work.
Any gold_source_ids consumption in scoring or seeding -> measurement void.
Any new embedding/LLM/network call -> budget-discipline violation, measurement void.

scope_boundary.splits: development n=200 per dataset only; certificate halves untouched
scope_boundary.t3_full: K2-vs-K1 score digest change + second-edge null deferred to a separate rung

locked_parameters.kernel: compose_typed_scores unmodified, mode=typed, TypedCompositionPolicyV1 defaults except seed_k
